keyboard.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
keyboard.hint: Press Esc to close this dialog. Shortcuts are disabled when typing in input fields.

welcome.title: Welcome to the Pension Calculator!
welcome.description: This guided tour will help you understand how to use the calculator to estimate your Romanian pension. Let's get started!

birthDate.title: Birth Date
birthDate.description: Enter your birth date here. This is used to calculate your current age and determine when you'll be eligible for retirement (standard retirement age is 65 years).

retirementYear.title: Planned Retirement Year
retirementYear.description: Enter the year you plan to retire. The calculator will suggest a year based on the standard retirement age of 65, but you can adjust this.

contributionPeriods.title: Contribution Periods
contributionPeriods.description: Add your employment periods here. Each period contributes to your pension points based on salary and duration. You can also add non-contributive periods like military service or university.

workingConditions.title: Working Conditions
workingConditions.description: If you worked in difficult or special conditions, you may be entitled to bonus points: Group II (Difficult) gives 25% bonus, Group I (Very Difficult) and Special Conditions give 50% bonus.

pensionEstimate.title: Your Pension Estimate
pensionEstimate.description: This shows your estimated monthly and yearly pension based on your total points. The calculation uses the 2024 reference value of 81.03 RON per point.

complete.title: Tour Complete!
complete.description: You now know the basics! Feel free to explore the FAQ section for more detailed information about how pension calculations work.

howCalculated.question: How is the pension calculated?
howCalculated.answer: Your pension is calculated using the formula: Monthly Pension = Total Points × Reference Value (81.03 RON). Total Points include contribution points (based on salary ratio to average salary), stability points (based on years worked), and non-contributive points.

contributionPoints.question: What are contribution points?
contributionPoints.answer: Contribution points are calculated based on the ratio of your gross salary to the national average salary for each year you worked. If your salary equals the average, you earn 1 point per year. Higher salaries earn proportionally more points.

stabilityPoints.question: What are stability points?
stabilityPoints.answer: Stability points reward long-term employment. You earn 0.5 points for every year worked beyond the minimum contribution period of 15 years, up to the complete contribution period of 35 years.

nonContributive.question: What are non-contributive periods?
nonContributive.answer: Non-contributive periods are time periods that count toward your pension even without salary contributions. These include: Military Service (0.25 points/year), University Studies (0.25 points/year), Child Care (0.25 points/year), and Medical Leave (0.20 points/year).

workingConditions.question: How do working conditions affect my pension?
workingConditions.answer: If you worked in special conditions, you receive bonus points: Normal Conditions - no bonus, Group II (Difficult conditions) - 25% bonus on contribution points, Group I (Very difficult conditions) - 50% bonus, Special Conditions - 50% bonus.

minimumContribution.question: What is the minimum contribution period?
minimumContribution.answer: The minimum contribution period in Romania is 15 years. You need at least this many years of contributions to be eligible for a pension. The complete contribution period is 35 years.

retirementAge.question: What is the standard retirement age?
retirementAge.answer: The standard retirement age in Romania is 65 years. This is when you become eligible to receive your full pension benefits, assuming you've met the minimum contribution requirements.

referenceValue.question: What is the pension point reference value?
referenceValue.answer: The reference value (valoarea punctului de pensie) is the amount in RON that each pension point is worth. As of 2024, this value is 81.03 RON. This value is periodically adjusted by the government.

tooltips.birthDate: Your birth date is used to calculate your current age and determine retirement eligibility. Standard retirement age is 65 years.
tooltips.retirementYear: The year you plan to retire. You can retire after reaching age 65, assuming minimum contribution requirements are met.
tooltips.monthlyGrossSalary: Your gross monthly salary before taxes. This is compared to the national average to calculate contribution points.
tooltips.startDate: The start date of this employment or non-contributive period.
tooltips.endDate: The end date of this employment or non-contributive period.
tooltips.company: Optional: The name of the company or organization where you worked.
tooltips.workingCondition: Select the working conditions for this period. Special conditions grant bonus points: Group II +25%, Group I +50%, Special +50%.
tooltips.nonContributiveType: The type of non-contributive period. Different types earn different point rates per year.
tooltips.contributionPoints: Points earned based on your salary compared to the national average. Higher salary = more points.
tooltips.stabilityPoints: Bonus points for long-term employment. Earned for years beyond the 15-year minimum, up to 35 years.
tooltips.totalPoints: The sum of all your points: contribution + stability + non-contributive. Multiplied by 81.03 RON to get your pension.

limitations.title: Calculator Limitations
limitations.estimateOnly: This calculator provides estimates only and should not be considered as official pension calculations.
limitations.notOfficial: Results are not official and do not replace consultations with Casa Națională de Pensii Publice (CNPP).
limitations.lawChanges: Pension laws and formulas may change. The calculator is based on 2024 Romanian pension legislation.
limitations.noGuarantee: We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the calculations.
limitations.consultProfessional: For official pension information, please consult with CNPP or a qualified pension advisor.

privacy.title: Data Privacy Policy
privacy.localStorage: All your data is stored locally in your browser only. No data is sent to any server.
privacy.noServer: This application runs entirely in your browser. We do not collect, store, or process your personal information.
privacy.noThirdParty: No third-party tracking, analytics, or advertising services are used.
privacy.gdprCompliant: Compliant with GDPR and Romanian Law no. 190/2018 on data protection.
privacy.deleteAnytime: You can delete all stored data anytime by clearing your browser's local storage or site data.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.freeUse: This calculator is provided free of charge for informational purposes only.
terms.informationalOnly: The information provided should be used for personal planning and educational purposes only.
terms.noLiability: The developers and operators are not liable for any decisions made based on the calculator's results.
terms.userResponsibility: Users are responsible for verifying all information with official sources before making financial decisions.

compliance.title: Romanian Law Compliance
compliance.description: This application is designed to comply with Romanian data protection regulations. Your personal data remains on your device and under your control at all times.
compliance.laws: Applicable legislation: GDPR (EU 2016/679), Romanian Law no. 190/2018, Romanian Law no. 263/2010 (Pension System Law)

specialRetirement.title: Special Working Conditions Retirement
specialRetirement.infoTitle: Reduced Retirement Age for Special Conditions
specialRetirement.infoDescription: Workers who have spent time in Group I (very difficult), Group II (difficult), or special working conditions may be eligible to retire earlier than the standard retirement age of 65.
specialRetirement.currentlyEligible: You are currently eligible for this reduced retirement age!
specialRetirement.yearsUntilEligible: {{years}} years until you reach this retirement age
specialRetirement.needsMinimumContribution: You need to meet the minimum 15 years contribution requirement
specialRetirement.needsMoreYearsInCondition: Need {{needed}} more years in this condition for full reduction
specialRetirement.bestOptionDetails: Based on your work history, you can retire at age {{age}} ({{reduction}} years earlier than standard)
specialRetirement.disclaimer: These calculations are estimates based on Romanian pension law (Legea 263/2010). Actual eligibility may depend on additional factors. Please consult with Casa Nationala de Pensii Publice (CNPP) for official information.

groupI.name: Group I - Very Difficult Conditions
groupI.description: Underground mining, nuclear, chemical industries, and other hazardous work with 50% bonus and up to 10 years earlier retirement

groupII.name: Group II - Difficult Conditions
groupII.description: Heavy industry, construction, metallurgy with 25% bonus and up to 5 years earlier retirement

specialConditions.name: Special Conditions
specialConditions.description: Other hazardous work environments with 50% bonus and up to 10 years earlier retirement

stabilityTracker.title: Stability Bonus Progress
stabilityTracker.needMoreYears: You need {{years}} more years of contributions to start earning stability points.
stabilityTracker.congratulations: You have reached the maximum stability bonus tier. Excellent work!

comparison.title: National Pension Comparison
comparison.sourceNote: Based on {{year}} CNPP national pension statistics

percentileContext.excellent: Your pension is in the top 10% nationally. Excellent retirement income!
percentileContext.good: Your pension is higher than 75% of Romanian pensioners. Very good!
percentileContext.above_average: Your pension is above the national average. You're doing well!
percentileContext.average: Your pension is around the national average.
percentileContext.below_average: Your pension is below the national average. Consider additional savings.
percentileContext.low: Your pension is in the lower range. Additional retirement planning may be beneficial.

inflationAdjustment.title: Inflation Impact Analysis
inflationAdjustment.description: See how inflation could affect your pension's purchasing power over time
inflationAdjustment.summary: After {{years}} years at {{rate}}% annual inflation, your pension of {{pension}} would have the purchasing power of {{realValue}} in today's money - a loss of {{lossPercent}}%.
inflationAdjustment.note: This projection assumes no pension indexation. In practice, Romanian pensions are periodically adjusted by the government, which may partially offset inflation.
inflationAdjustment.disclaimer: These projections are estimates for planning purposes only. Actual inflation rates will vary. Consult a financial advisor for personalized retirement planning.

recommendations.title: Personalized Recommendations
recommendations.disclaimer: These recommendations are estimates based on current legislation. Actual outcomes may vary. Consult CNPP for official guidance.

milestones.minimumDescription: You need {{years}} more years of contributions to reach the minimum {{minimum}}-year requirement and become eligible for a pension.
milestones.completeDescription: Contributing for {{years}} more years to reach {{complete}} years would unlock early retirement eligibility and add approximately {{additionalPension}} RON/month.

stability.nextTierDescription: In {{years}} more years of contributions, you will enter stability Tier {{tier}} earning {{pointsPerYear}} bonus points/year, worth up to {{potentialPension}} RON/month extra.
stability.currentTierDescription: You are currently in Tier {{tier}}. {{years}} more years will complete this tier, earning {{remainingPoints}} additional stability points (+{{remainingPension}} RON/month).
stability.maxReachedDescription: Congratulations! You have reached the maximum stability bonus tier. Your long career is fully rewarded with the highest stability points.

salary.belowAverageTitle: Your Salary is Below National Average
salary.belowAverageDescription: Your current salary ({{currentSalary}} RON) is below the national average ({{nationalAverage}} RON). Reaching the average would add {{additionalPointsPerYear}} points per year (+{{additionalPensionPerYear}} RON/month).
salary.increaseImpactDescription: A salary increase of {{increaseAmount}} RON would add {{additionalPointsPerYear}} extra contribution points per year, increasing your pension by approximately {{additionalPensionPerYear}} RON/month.

conditions.awarenessDescription: All your periods are set to normal conditions. If you work in difficult, hazardous, or special conditions, updating this could add 25-50% bonus points and enable earlier retirement.

retirement.canReachCompleteDescription: With {{yearsToRetirement}} years until retirement and {{currentYears}} years contributed, you can reach the complete {{target}}-year period. Continue working to maximize your pension.
retirement.maximizeRemainingDescription: With {{yearsToRetirement}} years until retirement, focus on maximizing contributions. You can accumulate up to {{maxYears}} total years (target: {{complete}} years).
retirement.earlyStartDescription: Starting contributions early gives you a strong advantage. With {{yearsToRetirement}} years until retirement, you could accumulate up to {{projectedYears}} contribution years.

print.disclaimer: This is an estimate only. For official pension information, consult Casa Nationala de Pensii Publice (CNPP).

history.title: Calculation History
history.notesPlaceholder: Add any notes about this calculation...
history.restoreWarningMessage: Restoring this snapshot will replace all your current calculation data. This action cannot be undone.
history.noSnapshotsHint: Save your current calculation to compare it with future versions
history.capacityWarning: History is at maximum capacity. Oldest entries will be removed when saving new ones.
history.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all saved calculations?

lawVersions.title: Pension Law Version
lawVersions.tooltip: Romanian pension law has changed over the years. Select a law version to calculate your pension based on that specific legislative framework.
lawVersions.historicalWarning: You are calculating with a historical law version. Results reflect past legislation and may differ from current pension calculations.
lawVersions.noChanges: No significant parameter changes between these versions.

descriptions.legea_360_2023: September 2024 pension reform with new VPR-based calculation formula
descriptions.oug_163_2022: Emergency ordinance adjusting pension indexation and minimum pension
descriptions.legea_127_2019: Modifications to pension point value and indexation rules
descriptions.legea_263_2010: Unified public pension system establishing the point-based formula
descriptions.legea_19_2000: First modern pension law introducing the contribution point system

changes.360_vpr: Introduced VPR (Pension Point Reference Value) = 81.03 RON
changes.360_formula: New calculation formula: Monthly Pension = Total Points x VPR
changes.360_stabilityPoints: Enhanced stability points system with three tiers
changes.360_recalculation: Mandatory recalculation of all existing pensions
changes.163_pensionPoint: Pension point value set to 75.00 RON
changes.127_pensionPoint: Significant increase in pension point value
changes.263_unifiedSystem: Unified all public pension schemes into one system
changes.263_retirementAge: Standard retirement age set to 65 years
changes.19_firstModernLaw: First modern pension law establishing a point-based system
changes.19_pointSystem: Introduced contribution points based on salary/average ratio
changes.19_retirementAge: Initial retirement age set to 63 years
changes.19_workingConditions: Defined working condition categories (Group I, II, Special)
